text.tspan: Share of urban vs. rural population using at least basic sanitation, 2024

Share of urban versus rural population using at least basic sanitation facilities, that is
improved sanitation

facilities
, such as toilets or latrines, not shared with other households.
Data source: WHO/UNICEF Joint Monitoring Programme for Water Supply, Sanitation and Hygiene (2025)
